title: aletris pauciflora var. khasiana
intro: Aletris pauciflora var. khasiana, also known as Khasian grass or mountain unicorn root, is a plant species that belongs to the Colchicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aletris pauciflora var. khasiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Aletris pauciflora var. khasiana is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin infections.
